mnemonics: Make Every Input Relevant To Understand Naturally
Keep Every Input Relevant To Understand Naturally
keyPoints: A balanced search tree is a data structure that keeps data sorted and allows for efficient searching, insertion, and deletion.
The height of a binary search tree should be approximately log(n) for optimal performance.
In a balanced search tree, the left and right child nodes of a node should have a height difference of at most 1.
